text: vayehi ׀ bisheloshim shana barevi'i bachamisha lachodesh vaani vetovkhe-hagovla 'al-nehar-kevar nifetechu hashamayim vaeree mareovt elohim
bachamisha lachodesh hi hashana hachamishit legalut hamelekh yovyakhin
hayo haya devar-yehva el-yechezeqel ben-buzi hakohen beerets kasedim 'al-nehar-kevar vatehi 'alayv sham yad-yehva
vaere vehine rucha se'ara baa min-hatsafovn 'anan gadovl veesh mitelaqachat venogah lov saviv umitovkhah ke'eyn hachashemal mitovkh haesh
umitovkhah demut areba' chayovt veze mareeyhen demut adam lahena
veareba'a fanim leechat veareba' kenafayim leachat lahem
verageleyhem regel yeshara vekhaf rageleyhem kekhaf regel 'egel venotsetsim ke'eyn nechoshet qalal
veyadov kh videy q adam mitachat kanefeyhem 'al areba'at rive'eyhem ufeneyhem vekhanefeyhem leareba'etam
choverot isha el-achovtah kanefeyhem lo-yisabu velekhetan ish el-'ever panayv yelekhu
udemut peneyhem peney adam ufeney areye el-hayamin leareba'etam ufeney-shovr mehasemovl leareba'etan ufeney-nesher leareba'etan
ufeneyhem vekhanefeyhem perudovt milema'ela leish tayim choverovt ish ushetayim mekhasovt et geviyoteyhena ׃
veish el-'ever panayv yelekhu el asher yiheyeh-shama harucha lalekhet yelekhu lo yisabu belekhetan
udemut hachayovt mareeyhem kegachaley-esh bo'arovt kemaree halapidim hi mitehalekhet beyn hachayovt venogah laesh umin-haesh yovtse varaq
vehachayovt ratsov vashovv kemaree habazaq
vaere hachayovt vehine ovfan echad baarets etsel hachayovt leareba'at panayv
maree haovfanim uma'aseyhem ke'eyn tareshish udemut echad leareba'etan umareeyhem uma'aseyhem kaasher yiheye haovfan betovkh haovfan
'al-areba'at rive'eyhen belekhetam yelekhu lo yisabu belekhetan
vegabeyhen vegovah lahem veyirea lahem vegabotam meleot 'eynayim saviv leareba'etan
uvelekhet hachayovt yelekhu haovfanim etselam uvehinase hachayovt me'al haarets yinaseu haovfanim
'al asher yiheyeh-sham harucha lalekhet yelekhu shama harucha lalekhet vehaovfanim yinaseu le'umatam ki rucha hachaya baovfanim
belekhetam yelekhu uve'amedam ya'amodu uvehinaseam me'al haarets yinaseu haovfanim le'umatam ki rucha hachaya baovfanim
udemut 'al-rashey hachaya raqi'a ke'eyn haqerach hanovra natuy 'al-rasheyhem milema'ela
vetachat haraqi'a kanefeyhem yesharovt isha el-achovtah leish shetayim mekhasovt lahena uleish shetayim mekhasovt lahena et geviyoteyhem
vaeshema' et-qovl kanefeyhem keqovl mayim rabim keqovl-shaday belekhetam qovl hamula keqovl machane be'amedam terapeyna khanefeyhen
vayehi-qovl me'al laraqi'a asher 'al-rosham be'amedam terapeyna khanefeyhen
umima'al laraqi'a asher 'al-rosham kemaree even-sapir demut kise ve'al demut hakise demut kemaree adam 'alayv milema'ela
vaere ׀ ke'eyn chashemal kemareeh-esh beyt-lah saviv mimaree matenayv ulema'ela umimaree matenayv ulemata raiti kemareeh-esh venogah lov saviv
kemaree haqeshet asher yiheye ve'anan beyovm hageshem ken maree hanogah saviv hu maree demut kevovd-yehva vaeree vaepol 'al-panay vaeshema' qovl medaber s
vayomer elay ben-adam 'amod 'al-rageleykha vaadaber otakh
vatavo vi rucha kaasher diber elay vata'amideni 'al-ragelay vaeshema' et midaber elay f
vayomer elay ben-adam shovlecha ani ovtekha el-beney yiserael el-govyim hamovredim asher maredu-vi hema vaavovtam pashe'u vi 'ad-'etsem hayovm haze
vehabanim qeshey fanim vechizeqey-lev ani shovlecha ovtekha aleyhem veamareta aleyhem ko amar adonay yehovi
vehema im-yisheme'u veim-yechedalu ki beyt meri hema veyade'u ki navi haya vetovkham f
veata ven-adam al-tira mehem umidivereyhem al-tira ki saravim vesalovnim ovtakh veel-'aqerabim ata yovshev midivereyhem al-tira umipeneyhem al-techat ki beyt meri hema
vedibareta et-devaray aleyhem im-yisheme'u veim-yechedalu ki meri hema f
veata ven-adam shema' et asher-ani medaber eleykha al-tehi-meri keveyt hameri petse fikha veekhol et asher-ani noten eleykha
vaeree vehineh-yad shelucha elay vehineh-vov megilat-sefer
vayiferos ovtah lefanay vehi khetuva panim veachovr vekhatuv eleyha qinim vahege vahi s
vayomer elay ben-adam et asher-timetsa ekhovl ekhovl et-hamegila hazot velekh daber el-beyt yiserael
vaefetach et-pi vayaakhileni et hamegila hazot
vayomer elay ben-adam bitenekha taakhel ume'eykha temale et hamegila hazot asher ani noten eleykha vaokhela vatehi befi kidevash lematovq f
vayomer elay ben-adam lekhe-bo el-beyt yiserael vedibareta videvaray aleyhem
ki lo el-'am 'imeqey safa vekhivedey lashovn ata shalucha el-beyt yiserael
lo ׀ el-'amim rabim 'imeqey safa vekhivedey lashovn asher lo-tishema' divereyhem im-lo aleyhem shelachetikha hema yisheme'u eleykha
uveyt yiserael lo yovu lishemo'a eleykha ki-eynam ovim lishemo'a elay ki kal-beyt yiserael chizeqey-metsach uqeshey-lev hema
hine natati et-paneykha chazaqim le'umat peneyhem veet-mitsechakha chazaq le'umat mitsecham
keshamir chazaq mitsor natati mitsechekha lo-tira ovtam velo-techat mipeneyhem ki beyt-meri hema f
vayomer elay ben-adam et-kal-devaray asher adaber eleykha qach bilevavekha uveazeneykha shema'
velekh bo el-hagovla el-beney 'amekha vedibareta aleyhem veamareta aleyhem ko amar adonay yehovi im-yisheme'u veim-yechedalu
vatisaeni rucha vaeshema' acharay qovl ra'ash gadovl barukh kevovd-yehva mimeqovmov
veqovl ׀ kanefey hachayovt mashiqovt isha el-achovtah veqovl haovfanim le'umatam veqovl ra'ash gadovl
verucha nesaateni vatiqacheni vaelekh mar bachamat ruchi veyad-yehva 'alay chazaqa
vaavov el-hagovla tel aviv hayoshevim el-nehar-kevar vaasher kh vaeshev q hema yovshevim sham vaeshev sham shive'at yamim mashemim betovkham
vayehi miqetse shive'at yamim f vayehi devar-yehva elay lemor
ben-adam tsofe netatikha leveyt yiserael veshama'eta mipi davar vehizehareta ovtam mimeni
beameri larasha' movt tamut velo hizeharetov velo dibareta lehazehir rasha' midarekov haresha'a lechayotov hu rasha' ba'aonov yamut vedamov miyadekha avaqesh
veata ki-hizehareta rasha' velo-shav merishe'ov umidarekov haresha'a hu ba'aonov yamut veata et-nafeshekha hitsaleta s
uveshuv tsadiq mitsideqov ve'asa 'avel venatati mikheshovl lefanayv hu yamut ki lo hizeharetov bechatatov yamut velo tizakharena tsideqotav asher 'asa vedamov miyadekha avaqesh
veata ki hizeharetov tsadiq levileti chato tsadiq vehu lo-chata chayov yicheye ki nizehar veata et-nafeshekha hitsaleta s
vatehi 'alay sham yad-yehva vayomer elay qum tse el-habiqe'a vesham adaber ovtakh
vaaqum vaetse el-habiqe'a vehineh-sham kevovd-yehva 'omed kakavovd asher raiti 'al-nehar-kevar vaepol 'al-panay
vatavo-vi rucha vata'amideni 'al-ragelay vayedaber oti vayomer elay bo hisager betovkh beytekha
veata ven-adam hine natenu 'aleykha 'avovtim vaasarukha bahem velo tetse betovkham
uleshovnekha adebiq el-chikekha veneelameta velo-tiheye lahem leish movkhicha ki beyt meri hema
uvedaberi ovtekha efetach et-pikha veamareta aleyhem ko amar adonay yehovi hashome'a ׀ yishema' vehechadel ׀ yechedal ki beyt meri hema s
veata ven-adam qach-lekha levena venatata ovtah lefaneykha vechaqovta 'aleyha 'ir et-yerushalaim
venatata 'aleyha matsovr uvanita 'aleyha dayeq veshafakheta 'aleyha solela venatata 'aleyha machanovt vesim-'aleyha karim saviv
veata qach-lekha machavat barezel venatata ovtah qir barezel beynekha uveyn ha'ir vahakhinota et-paneykha eleyha vehayeta vamatsovr vetsareta 'aleyha ovt hi leveyt yiserael s
veata shekhav 'al-tsidekha hasemali vesameta et-'aon beyt-yiserael 'alayv misepar hayamim asher tishekav 'alayv tisa et-'aonam
vaani natati lekha et-sheney 'aonam lemisepar yamim shelosh-meovt vetishe'im yovm venasata 'aon beyt-yiserael
vekhilita et-ele veshakhaveta 'al-tsidekha hayemovni kh hayemani q shenit venasata et-'aon beyt-yehuda areba'im yovm yovm lashana yovm lashana netativ lakh
veel-metsovr yerushalaim takhin paneykha uzero'akha chasufa venibeta 'aleyha
vehine natati 'aleykha 'avovtim velo-tehafekh mitsidekha el-tsidekha 'ad-kalovtekha yemey metsurekha

veata qach-lekha chitin use'orim ufovl va'adashim vedochan vekhusemim venatata ovtam bikheli echad ve'asita ovtam lekha lelachem misepar hayamim asher-ata ׀ shovkhev 'al-tsidekha shelosh-meovt vetishe'im yovm tokhalenu
umaakhalekha asher tokhalenu bemisheqovl 'eserim sheqel layovm me'et 'ad-'et tokhalenu
umayim bimesura tishete shishit hahin me'et 'ad-'et tishete
ve'ugat se'orim tokhalena vehi begeleley tseat haadam te'ugena le'eyneyhem s
vayomer yehva kakha yokhelu veney-yiserael et-lachemam tame bagovyim asher adichem sham
vaomar ahah adonay yehvi hine nafeshi lo metumaa unevela uterefa lo-akhaleti mine'uray ve'ad-'ata velo-va befi besar pigul s
vayomer elay ree natati lekha et tsefu'ey kh tsefi'ey q habaqar tachat geleley haadam ve'asita et-lachemekha 'aleyhem s
vayomer elay ben-adam hineni shover mateh-lechem birushalaim veakhelu-lechem bemisheqal uvideaga umayim bimesura uveshimamovn yishetu
lema'an yacheseru lechem vamayim venashamu ish veachiv venamaqu ba'aonam f
veata ven-adam qach-lekha ׀ cherev chada ta'ar hagalavim tiqachena lakh veha'avareta 'al-roshekha ve'al-zeqanekha velaqacheta lekha mozeney misheqal vechilaqetam
shelishit baur tave'ir betovkh ha'ir kimelot yemey hamatsovr velaqacheta et-hashelishit take vacherev sevivovteyha vehashelishit tizere larucha vecherev ariq achareyhem
velaqacheta misham me'at bemisepar vetsareta ovtam bikhenafeykha
umehem 'ovd tiqach vehishelakheta ovtam el-tovkh haesh vesarafeta otam baesh mimenu tetse-esh el-kal-beyt yiserael f
ko amar adonay yehovi zot yerushalaim betovkh hagovyim sametiha usevivovteyha aratsovt
vatemer et-mishepatay lerishe'a min-hagovyim veet-chuqovtay min-haaratsovt asher sevivovteyha ki vemishepatay maasu vechuqovtay lo-halekhu vahem s
lakhen koh-amar ׀ adonay yehvi ya'an hamanekhem min-hagovyim asher sevivovteykhem bechuqovtay lo halakhetem veet-mishepatay lo 'asitem ukhemishepetey hagovyim asher sevivovteykhem lo 'asitem s
lakhen ko amar adonay yehvi hineni 'alayikh gam-ani ve'asiti vetovkhekh mishepatim le'eyney hagovyim
ve'asiti vakh et asher lo-'asiti veet asher-lo-e'ese khamohu 'ovd ya'an kal-tov'avotayikh s
lakhen avovt yokhelu vanim betovkhekh uvanim yokhelu avovtam ve'asiti vakh shefatim vezeriti et-kal-sheeritekh lekhal-rucha f
lakhen chay-ani neum adonay yehvi im-lo ya'an et-miqedashi timet bekhal-shiqutsayikh uvekhal-tov'avotayikh vegam-ani egera' velo-tachovs 'eyni vegam-ani lo echemovl
shelishiteykh badever yamutu uvara'av yikhelu vetovkhekh vehashelishit bacherev yipelu sevivovtayikh vehashelishit lekhal-rucha ezare vecherev ariq achareyhem
vekhala api vahanichovti chamati bam vehinechameti veyade'u ki-ani yehva dibareti beqineati bekhalovti chamati bam
veetenekh lechareba ulecherepa bagovyim asher sevivovtayikh le'eyney kal-'ovver
vehayeta cherepa ugedufa musar umeshama lagovyim asher sevivovtayikh ba'asovti vakh shefatim beaf uvechema uvetokhechovt chema ani yehva dibareti
beshalechi et-chitsey hara'av hara'im bahem asher hayu lemashechit asher-ashalach ovtam leshachetekhem vera'av osef 'aleykhem veshavareti lakhem mateh-lachem
veshilacheti 'aleykhem ra'av vechaya ra'a veshikelukh vedever vadam ya'avar-bakh vecherev avi 'alayikh ani yehva dibareti f
vayehi devar-yehva elay lemor
ben-adam sim paneykha el-harey yiserael vehinave aleyhem
veamareta harey yiserael shime'u devar-adonay yehvi koh-amar adonay yehvi leharim velageva'ovt laafiqim velageayot kh velageayovt q hineni ani mevi 'aleykhem cherev veibadeti bamovteykhem
venashamu mizebechovteykhem venisheberu chamaneykhem vehipaleti chaleleykhem lifeney giluleykhem
venatati et-pigerey beney yiserael lifeney giluleyhem vezeriti et-'atsemovteykhem sevivovt mizebechovteykhem
bekhol movshevovteykhem he'arim techeravena vehabamovt tishamena lema'an yecherevu veyeeshemu mizebechovteykhem venisheberu venishebetu giluleykhem venigede'u chamaneykhem venimechu ma'aseykhem
venafal chalal betovkhekhem vida'etem ki-ani yehva
vehovtareti biheyovt lakhem pelitey cherev bagovyim behizarovteykhem baaratsovt

vezakheru feliteykhem ovti bagovyim asher nishebu-sham asher nishebareti et-libam hazovne asher-sar me'alay veet 'eyneyhem hazonovt acharey giluleyhem venaqotu bifeneyhem el-hara'ovt asher 'asu lekhol tov'avoteyhem
veyade'u ki-ani yehva lo el-chinam dibareti la'asovt lahem hara'a hazot f
koh-amar adonay yehvi hake vekhapekha ureqa' beragelekha veemar-ach el kal-tov'avovt ra'ovt beyt yiserael asher bacherev bara'av uvadever yipolu
harachovq badever yamut vehaqarovv bacherev yipovl vehanishear vehanatsur bara'av yamut vekhileyti chamati bam

vida'etem ki-ani yehva biheyovt chaleleyhem betovkh giluleyhem sevivovt mizebechovteyhem el kal-give'a rama bekhol ׀ rashey heharim vetachat kal-'ets ra'anan vetachat kal-ela 'avuta meqovm asher natenu-sham reycha nichocha lekhol giluleyhem
venatiti et-yadi 'aleyhem venatati et-haarets shemama umeshama mimidebar divelata bekhol movshevovteyhem veyade'u ki-ani yehva f
vayehi devar-yehva elay lemor
veata ven-adam koh-amar adonay yehvi leademat yiserael qets ba haqets 'al areba'at kh areba' q kanefovt haarets
'ata haqets 'alayikh veshilacheti api bakh ushefatetikh kiderakhayikh venatati 'alayikh et kal-tov'avotayikh
velo-tachovs 'eyni 'alayikh velo echemovl ki derakhayikh 'alayikh eten vetov'avovtayikh betovkhekh tiheyeyna vida'etem ki-ani yehva f
ko amar adonay yehvi ra'a achat ra'a hine vaa
qets ba ba haqets heqits elayikh hine baa
baa hatsefira eleykha yovshev haarets ba ha'et qarovv hayovm mehuma velo-hed harim
'ata miqarovv eshepovkh chamati 'alayikh vekhileyti api bakh ushefatetikh kiderakhayikh venatati 'alayikh et kal-tov'avovtayikh
velo-tachovs 'eyni velo echemovl kiderakhayikh 'alayikh eten vetov'avovtayikh betovkhekh tiheyeyna vida'etem ki ani yehva make
hine hayovm hine vaa yatsea hatsefira tsats hamate parach hazadovn
hechamas ׀ qam lemateh-resha' lo-mehem velo mehamovnam velo mehemehem velo-noha bahem
ba ha'et higi'a hayovm haqovne al-yisemach vehamovkher al-yiteabal ki charovn el-kal-hamovnah
ki hamovkher el-hamimekar lo yashuv ve'ovd bachayim chayatam ki-chazovn el-kal-hamovnah lo yashuv veish ba'aonov chayatov lo yitechazaqu
taqe'u vataqov'a vehakhin hakol veeyn holekh lamilechama ki charovni el-kal-hamovnah
hacherev bachuts vehadever vehara'av mibayit asher basade bacherev yamut vaasher ba'ir ra'av vadever yokhalenu
ufaletu peliteyhem vehayu el-heharim keyovney hageayovt kulam homovt ish ba'aonov
kal-hayadayim tirepeyna vekhal-birekayim telakhena mayim
vechageru saqim vekhiseta ovtam palatsut veel kal-panim busha uvekhal-rasheyhem qarecha
kasepam bachutsovt yashelikhu uzehavam lenida yiheye kasepam uzehavam lo-yukhal lehatsilam beyovm 'everat yehva nafesham lo yesabe'u ume'eyhem lo yemaleu ki-mikheshovl 'aonam haya
utsevi 'edeyov legaovn samahu vetsalemey tov'avotam shiqutseyhem 'asu vov 'al-ken netativ lahem lenida
unetativ beyad-hazarim lavaz ulerishe'ey haarets leshalal vechileluha kh vechileluhu q
vahasibovti fanay mehem vechilelu et-tsefuni uvau-vah paritsim vechileluha f
'ase haratovq ki haarets malea mishepat damim veha'ir malea chamas
veheveti ra'ey govyim veyareshu et-bateyhem vehishebati geovn 'azim venichalu meqadesheyhem
qefadah-va uviqeshu shalovm vaayin
hova 'al-hova tavov ushemu'a el-shemu'a tiheye uviqeshu chazovn minavi vetovra tovad mikohen ve'etsa mizeqenim
hamelekh yiteabal venasi yilebash shemama videy 'am-haarets tibahalena midarekam e'ese ovtam uvemishepeteyhem eshepetem veyade'u ki-ani yehva f
vayehi ׀ bashana hashishit bashishi bachamisha lachodesh ani yovshev beveyti veziqeney yehuda yovshevim lefanay vatipol 'alay sham yad adonay yehovi
vaeree vehine demut kemareeh-esh mimaree matenayv ulemata esh umimatenayv ulema'ela kemareeh-zohar ke'eyn hachashemala

vayishelach tavenit yad vayiqacheni betsitsit roshi vatisa oti rucha ׀ beyn-haarets uveyn hashamayim vatave oti yerushalaema bemareovt elohim el-petach sha'ar hapenimit hapovne tsafovna asher-sham movshav semel haqinea hamaqene
vehineh-sham kevovd elohey yiserael kamaree asher raiti babiqe'a
vayomer elay ben-adam sa-na 'eyneykha derekh tsafovna vaesa 'eynay derekh tsafovna vehine mitsafovn lesha'ar hamizebecha semel haqinea haze babia
vayomer elay ben-adam haroe ata mehem kh ma q hem q 'osim tov'evovt gedolovt asher beyt-yiserael ׀ 'osim po lerachoqa me'al miqedashi ve'ovd tashuv tiree tov'evovt gedolovt s
vayave oti el-petach hechatser vaeree vehine chor-echad baqir
vayomer elay ben-adam chatar-na vaqir vaechetor baqir vehine petach echad
vayomer elay bo uree et-hatov'evovt hara'ovt asher hem 'osim po
vaavov vaeree vehine khal-tavenit remes uvehema sheqets vekhal-giluley beyt yiserael mechuqe 'al-haqir saviv ׀ saviv
veshive'im ish miziqeney veyt-yiserael veyaazaneyahu ven-shafan 'omed betovkham 'omedim lifeneyhem veish miqetaretov beyadov va'atar 'anan-haqetoret 'ole
vayomer elay haraita ven-adam asher ziqeney veyt-yiserael 'osim bachoshekh ish bechaderey masekitov ki omerim eyn yehva roe otanu 'azav yehva et-haarets
vayomer elay 'ovd tashuv tiree tov'evovt gedolovt asher-hema 'osim
vayave oti el-petach sha'ar beyt-yehva asher el-hatsafovna vehineh-sham hanashim yoshevovt mevakovt et-hatamuz s
vayomer elay haraita ven-adam 'ovd tashuv tiree tov'evovt gedolovt meele

vayave oti el-chatsar beyt-yehva hapenimit vehineh-fetach heykhal yehva beyn haulam uveyn hamizebecha ke'eserim vachamisha ish achoreyhem el-heykhal yehva ufeneyhem qedema vehema mishetachavitem qedema lashamesh
vayomer elay haraita ven-adam hanaqel leveyt yehuda me'asovt et-hatov'evovt asher 'asu-fo ki-maleu et-haarets chamas vayashuvu lehakhe'iseni vehinam sholechim et-hazemovra el-apam
vegam-ani e'ese vechema lo-tachovs 'eyni velo echemol veqareu veazenay qovl gadovl velo eshema' ovtam
vayiqera veazenay qovl gadovl lemor qarevu pequdovt ha'ir veish keli mashechetov beyadov

vehine shisha anashim baim ׀ miderekhe-sha'ar ha'eleyovn asher ׀ mafene tsafovna veish keli mapatsov beyadov veish-echad betovkham lavush badim veqeset hasofer bematenayv vayavou vaya'amedu etsel mizebach hanechoshet
ukhevovd ׀ elohey yiserael na'ala me'al hakeruv asher haya 'alayv el mifetan habayit vayiqera el-haish halavush habadim asher qeset hasofer bematenayv s
vayomer yehva elov kh elayv q 'avor betovkh ha'ir betovkh yerushalaim vehitevita tav 'al-mitsechovt haanashim haneenachim vehaneenaqim 'al kal-hatov'evovt hana'asovt betovkhah
